name: Funnel Cake #1
recipeIngredient: 2/3 Cup Milk, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, salt, soda, baking powder, and sugar.
2. In another bowl, blend the beaten egg and milk (or more as needed).
3. Add the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients. Beat until smooth.
4. Fill a skillet or pan with 1 inch of oil and heat to 375°F.
5. Place a clean funnel in the center of the hot oil. Cover the small hole with your finger.
6. Carefully pour the batter into the funnel, allowing it to flow into the oil.
7. Use two spatulas to move the funnel and create patterns with the batter.
8. Fry until golden brown, about 1-2 minutes. Turn once with the spatulas.
9. Remove from the oil using paper towels to drain excess fat.
10. Place on a plate and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
11. Serve hot and repeat the process until all of the batter is used up.
